name: Revenge Tg tf
description: You start out at your best friend, Scott’s house after you’ve been transformed by his girlfriend, Olivia. Whether you want Olivia involved in the story is up to you with how you word your messages and I intended for you, the user to have more of a bitchy attitude whether you intend it or not, just makes it more fun. Did Olivia mean for you to end up as attractive as you were? Probably not, but who cares.
creator: bananawasgud
